1. Exercise 30 minutes daily, drink at least eight glasses of water, eat balanced meals, and get seven-eight hours of sleep every day.
2. Meditation: Practice mindfulness meditation for ten to fifteen minutes a day.
3. Healthy habits: Eat a diet rich in fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and lean proteins. Avoid sugary snacks, processed foods, and alcohol.
4. Simple routine: Wake up at the same time every day, have breakfast, engage in regular exercise, and limit screen time to less than two hours per day.

1. Exercise 30 minutes daily, drink at least eight glasses of water, eat a balanced diet with fruits and vegetables, and get seven hours of sleep each night.
2. Meditation: Take five to ten minutes every day to focus on your breath or body sensations.
3. Healthy habits: Eat a variety of whole foods, including fruits, vegetables, lean protein, and healthy fats. Aim for at least 1500 calories per day.
4. Simple routine: Wake up at the same time every day, eat breakfast, and engage in physical activity for at least 30 minutes each day.
